name: Remove Noise from Microscopy Image using FFT Bandpass Filter
description: A microscopy image has been corrupted by both high-frequency noise and low-frequency uneven illumination. Clean the image located at ~/ImageJ_Data/raw/noisy_blobs.tif using an FFT Bandpass Filter. Filter out large structures (approximately 40 pixels) and small structures (approximately 3-5 pixels) without suppressing stripes. Save the filtered image to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/filtered_image.tif. Create a CSV report at ~/ImageJ_Data/results/bandpass_filter_results.csv comparing the 'Mean' and 'StdDev' statistics of the image before and after filtering, including columns for 'Condition' (Before/After), 'Mean', and 'StdDev'.
